title: Back from Beta
body:
# ⏳ BACK FROM BETA: Minecraft Like You Remember... But Better!

## ⚠️ _This modpack is still a work in progress_

### Miss the simplicity and mystery of Minecraft’s early days?
This modpack reignites the magic of Beta 1.7.3—where the world felt vast, untamed, and yours alone. No hand-holding, no NPCs, no cheap thrills. Just pure survival, exploration for its own sake, and that iconic "dig now, worry later" vibe—with a sprinkle of modern polish.

# 🔥 WHAT TO EXPECT:
## 🌍 A LONELY, LEGENDARY WORLD

![Minecraft Beta world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cd4e3afc33ae3eec9c1de3fed9fcf399235f591.jpeg)

- No NPCs, no structures, no free loot. Say goodbye to villages, pillagers, and even The End.
- The world is yours to shape—or conquer. Monsters rule the night; you’re just living in it.

## 🌙 NO SLEEPING—JUST SURVIVING
![A player fighting skeletons under moonlight, with a campfire spawn point nearby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23bf0d399023c21b4a8653fc9a2bd57b479bddee.jpeg)

- Beds? Gone. Relive the classic tension of "day for building, night for mining"—now with campfire respawns.
- Darker nights, higher stakes. Welcome back to true survival.

## 🛠️ BACK TO BASICS… BUT BETTER

![A rustic crafting table with old-school tools + new wood types side by side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f01f1dbf27d9e88add930c8fbced4c2f7ecf498f.jpeg)

- No JEI, no WAILA, no world map. Mine to discover, craft from memory (or use the vanilla's recipe book) — just like the good ol’ days.
- Modern blocks & mobs stay, but the soul is pure Beta. Netherite? Sure. Endless grinding? Nope. 

## 🗺️ IMMERSIVE, NOT EASY

(Image: A player holding a map with fog-of-war, next to a clock/compass UI.)

- Coordinates? Track them with clocks and compasses.
- Minimap? Craft it—then explore to reveal it. No magic GPS here.

## 🎯 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT:

- Nostalgic but fresh: Beta’s philosophy, without sacrificing modern quality-of-life.
- Hardcore-lite: No cheap shortcuts—just you vs. the unknown.
- Built for builders & explorers: The world feels alive because you make it matter.

## ⚠️ WARNING: Not for the impatient. But if you miss when Minecraft was raw, wild, and yours… hit "Download."
